calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing And Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Adwin, LLC DBA Sixt Rent A Car, a Nevada Limited Liability Company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Gregory J. Sowder, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Airport Van Rental, Inc., a California corporation.
No appearance by defendant Adwin, LLC DBA Sixt Rent A Car, a Nevada Limited Liability Company.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 9, 2016, and served by mail & acknowledgment of receipt of service on March 7, 2016. In accordance with CCP Section 415.40, service was effectuated on March 17, 2016.
Default as to defendant Adwin, LLC DBA Sixt Rent A Car, a Nevada Limited Liability Company was entered on May 10, 2016.
Plaintiff's first amended complaint was filed & served on July 17, 2017.
Default as to defendant Adwin, LLC DBA Sixt Rent A Car, a Nevada Limited Liability Company, was entered on September 12, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 20, 2017.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Pablo Gotelli and Javier Boustani as filed on March 5, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance was issued by Judge Stephen Murphy on June 20, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Airport Van Rental, Inc., a California corporation, and against the defaulted defendant, Adwin, LLC DBA Sixt Rent A Car, a Nevada Limited Liability Company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $797,512.75.
Prejudgment Interest - $79,751.26.
Costs - $990.00.
Total - $878,254.01.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
